target.query:
from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: min, createEmpty: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value <= float(v: "${frost_threshold}"))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

targets.query:
from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

panels.title: Dew point
panels.description: August-Roche-Magnus approximation from T + RH. Below 0 °C indicates frost risk.

targets.query:
import "math"

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature" or r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_measurement"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.WeatherStation_Temperature and exists r.WeatherStation_Humidity)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _field: "dew_point",
      _value: (243.04 * (math.log(x: r.WeatherStation_Humidity / 100.0) + (17.625 * r.WeatherStation_Temperature) / (243.04 + r.WeatherStation_Temperature))) / (17.625 - math.log(x: r.WeatherStation_Humidity / 100.0) - (17.625 * r.WeatherStation_Temperature) / (243.04 + r.WeatherStation_Temperature))
  }))
  |> yield(name: "dew_point")

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

panels.title: VPD
panels.description: Vapor Pressure Deficit (kPa). Ideal range 0.8–1.2 for most vegetables. Low VPD = humid/stagnant, high VPD = transpiration stress.

targets.query:
import "math"

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature" or r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_measurement"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.WeatherStation_Temperature and exists r.WeatherStation_Humidity)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _field: "vpd",
      _value: 0.6108 * math.exp(x: 17.27 * r.WeatherStation_Temperature / (r.WeatherStation_Temperature + 237.3)) * (1.0 - r.WeatherStation_Humidity / 100.0)
  }))
  |> yield(name: "vpd")

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_WindSpeed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

panels.title: Pressure
panels.description: Current barometric pressure. Rapid drop (>3 hPa in 3 h) suggests incoming storm.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "weatherstation")

  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

panels.title: Temperature + Dew point
panels.description: Dew point overlay. When T approaches dew point, condensation forms — frost risk when either ≤ 0 °C.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "temperature")
  |> yield(name: "temperature")

import "math"

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature" or r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_measurement"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.WeatherStation_Temperature and exists r.WeatherStation_Humidity)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _field: "dew_point",
      _value: (243.04 * (math.log(x: r.WeatherStation_Humidity / 100.0) + (17.625 * r.WeatherStation_Temperature) / (243.04 + r.WeatherStation_Temperature))) / (17.625 - math.log(x: r.WeatherStation_Humidity / 100.0) - (17.625 * r.WeatherStation_Temperature) / (243.04 + r.WeatherStation_Temperature))
  }))
  |> yield(name: "dew_point")

panels.title: Daily min / max / mean
panels.description: Garden-almanac view of the selected range. Freeze damage tracks daily min; heat stress tracks daily max.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "tmax")
  |> yield(name: "tmax")

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: min, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "tmin")
  |> yield(name: "tmin")

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "tmean")
  |> yield(name: "tmean")

panels.title: VPD (vapor pressure deficit)
panels.description: Colored bands show ideal VPD zone (green) from template variables. Values outside are stagnant (low) or transpiration-stressed (high).

targets.query:
import "math"

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature" or r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_measurement"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.WeatherStation_Temperature and exists r.WeatherStation_Humidity)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _field: "vpd",
      _value: 0.6108 * math.exp(x: 17.27 * r.WeatherStation_Temperature / (r.WeatherStation_Temperature + 237.3)) * (1.0 - r.WeatherStation_Humidity / 100.0)
  }))
  |> yield(name: "vpd")

panels.title: Humidity — relative & absolute
panels.description: %RH (left axis) and absolute humidity in g/m³ (right axis). Absolute humidity is the actual water mass in air; use with temperature to reason about fog/dew.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "relative_humidity")
  |> yield(name: "relative_humidity")

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_AbsoluteHumidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "absolute_humidity")
  |> yield(name: "absolute_humidity")

panels.title: Growing Degree Days (daily, base ${gdd_base} °C)
panels.description: Daily GDD = max(daily mean T − base, 0). Accumulated GDD predicts crop development stages (flowering, fruiting, harvest).

targets.query:
tbase = float(v: "${gdd_base}")

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value - tbase > 0.0 then r._value - tbase else 0.0, _field: "gdd" }))
  |> yield(name: "gdd")

panels.title: Daylight (relative DLI proxy)
panels.description: Daily integrated light from the raw ADC sensor. Uncalibrated — useful for comparing day-to-day light availability, not for absolute mol/m²/day.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Light")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "dli_proxy")
  |> yield(name: "dli_proxy")

panels.title: GDD cumulative (selected range)
panels.description: Sum of daily GDD over the selected time range at the current base temperature.

targets.query:
tbase = float(v: "${gdd_base}")

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value - tbase > 0.0 then r._value - tbase else 0.0, _field: "gdd" }))
  |> yield(name: "gdd")

panels.title: Chilling hours (<7.22 °C)
panels.description: Hours below 7.22 °C in the selected range — key for winter dormancy of fruit trees (cherries, apples, peaches need 200–1000 hrs).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 7.22)
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value), _field: "chilling_hours" }))
  |> yield(name: "chilling_hours")

panels.title: Heat stress hours (≥${heat_threshold} °C)
panels.description: Hours at or above the heat threshold — sustained exposure reduces fruit set in tomatoes, peppers, and brassicas.

targets.query:
heat = float(v: "${heat_threshold}")

from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_Temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value >= heat)
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value), _field: "heat_hours" }))
  |> yield(name: "heat_hours")

from(bucket: "weatherstation")

  |> last()

direction = from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_WindDirection")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")

  |> drop(columns: ["category", "item", "label", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "wind_direction")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

speed = from(bucket: "weatherstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WeatherStation_WindSpeed")

  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "wind_speed")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

union(tables: [direction, speed])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.wind_direction and exists r.wind_speed)
  |> yield(name: "wind_data")
